# REQ-OR-260011: Dual-View Rollout Must Be Feature-Flag Controlled with Immediate Fallback

- Class: OR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-12
- Source decision: dual-view rollout uses a controllable feature flag

## Requirement

The Network view rollout shall be controlled by a runtime-configurable feature flag (`networkViewEnabled`) and shall maintain Flow view as immediate fallback.

## Rationale

A flag-controlled rollout lowers operational risk and enables rapid rollback without redeploy.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for this requirement: environment-configurable flag posture, rollback-by-flag, fallback to Flow view.
- Out of scope for this requirement: permanent removal of Flow view.

## Verification

- Ops check confirms flag can be toggled by environment configuration.
- Runtime check confirms Network view is disabled when flag is off.
- Runtime check confirms Flow view remains available when flag is off.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260032
- Related backlog items: BI-260033
